effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_coral
effect.reserved_for: sparing tertiary accent only; never primary CTAs, headlines, or data

rule_text: Coral is a sparing tertiary accent only — never use it for primary CTAs, headlines, or data.
intent: Restrict Coral to prevent overuse and off-brand emphasis.
summary: Use coral only as a sparing tertiary accent; never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data.
